query:
WITH shift_day_counts AS (
  SELECT 
    DATE_FORMAT(rd.date, '%Y-%m') AS yr_month,
    MONTH(rd.date) AS month_num,
    YEAR(rd.date) AS year_num,
    e.shift,
    rd.date,
    COUNT(DISTINCT r.id) AS request_count
  FROM request_dates rd
  JOIN requests r ON rd.request_id = r.id
  JOIN employees e ON r.employee_id = e.id
  WHERE r.request_type = 'vacation'
    AND r.status = 'pending'
    AND (e.category != 'ancillary' OR e.category IS NULL)
    AND e.is_active = 1
  GROUP BY yr_month, month_num, year_num, e.shift, rd.date
)
SELECT 
  yr_month,
  shift,
  COUNT(*) AS oversubscribed_days,
  MAX(request_count) AS peak_count,
  ROUND(AVG(request_count), 1) AS avg_count
FROM shift_day_counts
WHERE request_count > 8
GROUP BY yr_month, shift
ORDER BY yr_month, shift;

  WHERE r.request_type = 'vacation'

    AND (e.category != 'ancillary' OR e.category IS NULL)
